content_guidelines: All-ages friendly, uplifting, and inclusive. Avoid any violent or graphic content and do not use strong profanity.
style_rules: Keep tone warm, grounded, and hopeful.
No strong profanity; avoid crude expressions.
Use concrete sensory details without graphic descriptions.
Maintain continuity of characters, scenes, and hooks.
structural_rules: Each episode must include a markdown table with a header that contains the word 'Scene' and uses pipe characters.
Include sections: '### Plot Summary', '### Complete Content', '### Character Updates', '### Hook Handling', and '### Emotional Curve'.
Track hooks by ID starting from H-001; list closed and new hooks per episode.
Resolve at least one hook by the final episode and leave at most three hooks open at the end.
